mapper.select: SELECT TRIM(b.BIZ_APP_ID) AS bizAppId, TRIM(b.BIZ_APP_NAME) AS bizAppName, TRIM(b.BIZ_APP_DESC) AS bizAppDesc, b.DUP_CHECK_YN AS dupCheckYn, b.QUE_NAME AS queName, c.CODE_NAME AS queNameDisplay, b.LOG_YN AS logYn, b.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, TRIM(b.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID) AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_BIZ_APP b LEFT JOIN FWK_CODE c ON c.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'FR20003' AND c.CODE = b.QUE_NAME WHERE b.BIZ_APP_ID = #{bizAppId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_BIZ_APP ( BIZ_APP_ID, BIZ_APP_NAME, BIZ_APP_DESC, DUP_CHECK_YN, QUE_NAME, LOG_YN, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{dto.bizAppId}, #{dto.bizAppName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.bizAppDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.dupCheckYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.queName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.logYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastUpdateDtime}, #{lastUpdateUserId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE FWK_BIZ_APP SET BIZ_APP_NAME = #{dto.bizAppName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BIZ_APP_DESC = #{dto.bizAppDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DUP_CHECK_YN = #{dto.dupCheckYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, QUE_NAME = #{dto.queName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LOG_YN = #{dto.logYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = #{lastUpdateDtime}, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{lastUpdateUserId} WHERE BIZ_APP_ID = #{bizAppId}
mapper.sql: b.BIZ_APP_ID, b.BIZ_APP_NAME, b.BIZ_APP_DESC, b.DUP_CHECK_YN, b.QUE_NAME, b.LOG_YN, b.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, b.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID
